description: Evals covering the three primary responsibilities of the skill: (1) routing edits to the `.ai/` source instead of agent-specific mirrors, (2) invoking the cross-platform Python sync script after edits, and (3) understanding the YAML frontmatter format for custom agents.

evals.name: edit-routes-to-ai-source
evals.prompt: I noticed the Roo rules file `.roo/rules/secrets.instructions.md` says 'never commit credentials'. I want to also forbid committing raw access tokens. Please make that edit.
evals.expected_output: Model edits .ai/secrets.instructions.md (the source), not the .roo/rules/ mirror. Model then runs the sync script.

assertions.text: Edit is applied to .ai/secrets.instructions.md, not to .roo/rules/secrets.instructions.md
Model runs the Python sync script (sync_agent_assets.py) after the edit
Model does not edit files under .roo/, .github/, .claude/, or AGENTS.md directly

evals.name: create-skill-under-ai
evals.prompt: Create a minimal new skill called `log-format-checker` that helps Claude review log files for PII. It should have a SKILL.md with a reasonable description. Put it somewhere the sync pipeline will pick it up.
evals.expected_output: Creates .ai/skills/log-format-checker/SKILL.md with valid frontmatter (name, description), then runs sync script so it propagates to .claude/skills/, .roo/skills/, .github/skills/.

assertions.text: SKILL.md starts with --- YAML frontmatter containing name and description fields
Model runs the Python sync script after creation
After sync, skill appears under .claude/skills/, .roo/skills/, and .github/skills/

evals.name: custom-agent-frontmatter
evals.prompt: Add a new custom agent called `branch-cleanup` that deletes stale branches. The agent should work with Roo Code, Claude Code, and Copilot. Use the groups `read`, `command`. Put it in the right location so all three pick it up.
evals.expected_output: Creates .ai/agents/branch-cleanup.agent.md with YAML frontmatter (name, description, tools, groups) and body instructions. Runs sync. Roomodes JSON gets rebuilt.

assertions.text: File has YAML frontmatter with name, description, and groups fields
groups field is set to ["read", "command"] (inline JSON array)
Model runs the Python sync script after creation
After sync, .roomodes JSON contains a customModes entry with slug 'branch-cleanup'
